commandsRun: pnpm exec playwright test automation-builder automation-node-editors automation-publish-gate
pnpm exec playwright test broadcast-and-automation segment
result.e2eSummary: All 17 automation specs PASS in ONE invocation: automation-builder 7 + automation-node-editors 8 + automation-publish-gate 2. Regression sweep also green: broadcast-and-automation 13 + build-segment 9 = 22 passed. One-spec/suite-at-a-time discipline observed (killed playwright/chrome + freed :8788/:5174 between every run).
result.notes: 5 originally-failing specs were 4 APP bugs (multiple root causes) + 1 SPEC bug. APP BUG A (the (+) edge-insert stacked): for a condition's two arms, edgeMidpoint returned identical (from.x, midY), so the two '+' buttons fully overlapped and the lower intercepted the upper's clicks ('intercepts pointer events'); the '+' at z-20 also sat over a card's ActionMenu dropdown. Fixed in orthogonal-path.ts (edgeMidpoint x=(from.x+to.x)/2 -> arms fan to distinct anchors) + AutomationCanvas.tsx ('+' lowered to z-10 so the dropdown paints over it). This alone fixed builder:181(delete), node-editors:106(webhook), node-editors:134(update-profile), and node-editors:155's first hop. Updated the edgeMidpoint unit test (it asserted the buggy behavior) + added a straight-down case. APP BUG B (node-editors:155 SEND attach): openEditor only persisted for NEW automations, so a freshly-inserted send node on an EXISTING automation 404'd on attach-template (drawer never closed) -> openEditor now ALWAYS persists first; and after attach the model wasn't refreshed, so reopening re-persisted the stale no-template model and wiped the attach -> added onReloadAutomation (GET /automations/:id) before onDone (this also fixed the cross-test pollution that made publish-gate:18 fail in the combined run). APP BUG C (publish-gate:30 node-publish-error missing): the typed API client threw only {status,error}, DROPPING the activate 409's node/missing -> ApiError now spreads the full error body. APP BUG D (publish-gate:30 / node-editors:155 return): AppShell.screenFor had NO /automations/:id sub-route, so the editor's Back fell through to Dashboards -> added /automations/:id -> AutomationBuilder (re-opens via takeReturnedTo). SPEC BUG: publish-gate:30 line 58 assumed the abandoned blank-design left an instance (send-start-over); but an immediate editor-back with no edits creates no copy (identical to the broadcast wizard flow), so the node correctly shows the PICKER -> removed the bogus send-start-over round-trip, pick the template directly. Final: 17/17 automation specs green in a single invocation; no regression in broadcast/segment suites. lintOk=true = the KNOWN-7 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps rule-definition errors only (config issue, all in files NOT touched here); changed files add no lint errors. NOT pushed.
result.testSummary: web unit: 115 passed / 4 skipped (automations 59 incl. node-config 17 + serialize 3 + model 15 + mutate 9 + layout 9 + orthogonal-path 6 — added 1 edgeMidpoint case). Full workspace typecheck: 43/43 packages clean. local-api integration tier (205) untouched: no local-api SOURCE changed in this finishing pass — the activate handler already returned {error,node,missing}; the bug was the SPA API client dropping those extra fields. SES/AWS mocks unchanged.
